Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails for Carmen Reyes's escalation and UrbanNest communications using search_emails (query: "Carmen" or "UrbanNest" or "escalation"). Discover email_carmen_compound_escalation_20260425 sent from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com, which raises four active housing items: (1) Simone Richter - Boston unit hold expiring tomorrow at 4 PM Eastern, studio vs 1BR unresolved, Julian emailed Carmen but no final decision received; (2) Tyler Okonkwo - Denver temporary housing confirmation requests still going to Blessing from the stale March contact sheet, needs Javier confirmed as owner; (3) Jordan Ekwueme - two Boston apartment holds expiring over the weekend without confirmed tour times, visits required per Suki before final booking; (4) Dr. Mehta - River North option has a 60-day minimum lease preference vs Fatimah's 3-4 week temporary window, needs direction on whether to pursue or pivot to a shorter-term option.
2. Search emails for Blessing Okafor's PTO notice using search_emails (query: "Blessing" or "PTO" or "emergency"). Discover email_blessing_pto_notice_chloe_20260425 sent from blessing.okafor@moveops.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com. Blessing is out April 26-27 for a family emergency and did not finish processing vendor emails that came in that afternoon. Key items she flags: (a) Jae-won Kim guarantor packet follow-up from Carmen that may belong to another coordinator, (b) Simone Richter unit type mismatch note also possibly mis-routed, (c) an Austin availability check for Ines Kovac in the same UrbanNest batch that she has not touched.
3. Search emails for all unread UrbanNest and vendor items in Blessing's inbox using search_emails (query: "Blessing" or "UrbanNest" or "Jae-won" or "Simone" or "Marcus Webb" or "Preethi Nair"). Discover multiple unread emails routed to Blessing: (a) email_urbannest_followup_jaewon_20260425 - Carmen asking about Jae-won Kim's corporate guarantor packet at Barton Creek Flats, lease on hold, unit not secure; (b) email_urbannest_followup_simone_20260425 - Carmen asking for owner confirmation on Simone Richter's unit type mismatch (studio vs 1BR); (c) email_blessing_unread_urbannest_brightloop_boston_20260425 - Carmen reporting Marcus Webb's Boston lease packet at 95 Kneeland is missing a signature page, hold expires Monday 11 AM Eastern; (d) email_blessing_unread_urbannest_cano_lowell_20260425 - Carmen asking if Blessing is still coordinator for Preethi Nair's Raleigh apartment search for BrightLoop Analytics, broker holding two virtual tour slots on April 26; (e) email_blessing_unread_vendor_followup_lina_hart_20260425 - Greg Pallone at Swift Relocations reporting Lily Marchetti's Chicago delivery is held because the building rejected the certificate of insurance (policy number truncated), needs updated COI by 5 PM Pacific or Monday window is lost.
4. Search emails for Carmen's March coordinator routing list using search_emails (query: "coordinator list" or "routing" or "March list"). Discover email_carmen_march_contact_sheet_forward from Carmen to Blessing, which shows the stale routing Carmen is still using: BrightLoop Boston placements to Blessing Okafor, Canopy Chicago and Denver placements to Blessing Okafor, PivotPoint Austin placements to Blessing Okafor, Executive temporary housing requests to Fatimah Al-Rashidi. This is the root cause of the mis-routing - Carmen's March list has not been updated to reflect coordinator reassignments.
5. Search Airtable for relocation records to verify the actual coordinator assignments using airtable_list_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations") or airtable_search_records for each case. Cross-reference Carmen's March list with the actual Airtable assignments to determine corrections needed. Discovery: (a) Jae-won Kim (recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel (not Blessing); (b) Simone Richter (recSimoneRichterBrightloop) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel (not Blessing); (c) Marcus Webb (recMarcusWebbBrightloop, Atlanta to Boston) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel (not Blessing); (d) Tyler Okonkwo (recTylerOkonkwoPhillyDenver) - Assigned Coordinator: Javier Morales (not Blessing); (e) Jordan Ekwueme (recReloc00000008, San Diego to Boston) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel; (f) Preethi Nair (recReloc00000000036, Atlanta to Raleigh) - Assigned Coordinator: Blessing Okafor (matches Carmen's list); (g) Ines Kovac (recReloc00000007, Brooklyn to Austin) - Assigned Coordinator: Blessing Okafor, Status: Completed.
6. Search Airtable or Linear for the Jae-won Kim case to verify the guarantor failure and status discrepancy using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Jae-won Kim") and linear_list_issues (query: "Jae-won" or "StormCloud"). Discovery in Airtable: recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin shows Status "In Progress" but the special requirements note says "Record incorrectly shows Completed" and "Lease still unsigned - UrbanNest flagged landlord holdout on guarantor paperwork." Discovery in Linear: (a) linear_issue_c97359216490 - "StormCloud Relocation - Jae-won Kim - SEA to AUS" was closed as part of batch closeout, but the issue thread (description + comments) shows Suki acknowledged the guarantor request on 4/9 and never followed through; (b) linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0 - low-priority follow-up created from support, noting Omar triaged it as low priority because Airtable showed "Completed"; (c) linear_issue_a49b4d199139 - larger StormCloud account reconstruction issue opened after Liam Park's 4/24 escalation, confirming Suki's failure to send the guarantor packet.
7. Search emails for Dr. Mehta's River North temporary housing options using search_emails (query: "Dr. Mehta" or "River North" or "Mehta housing"). Discover email_dr_mehta_housing_options_reply from Carmen to Fatimah with three premium options: Option 1 - The Hudson at River North (445 N Wabash Ave, $9,850/month, 60-day minimum lease preference), Option 2 - Lakefront Executive Suites at Streeterville (240 E Illinois St, $8,900/30 nights, more flexible terms), Option 3 - OneEleven at West Loop (not River North). The 60-day minimum on the Hudson conflicts with Fatimah's 3-4 week temporary stay window. Also search CRM using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Mehta") or crm_get_deal (id: "crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb") to discover the CRM deal crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb showing $12,170 total for Dr. Mehta's executive relocation, including $4,800 budgeted for temporary corporate housing via UrbanNest.
8. Search emails for Jordan Ekwueme's Boston apartment visit scheduling and hold status using search_emails (query: "Jordan Ekwueme" or "Jordan Boston" or "apartment visit"). Discover: (a) email_brightloop_ekwueme_urbannest_reply - Carmen provided three Boston/Cambridge options plus The Hive Cambridge temp housing at 200 Binney St, $195/night; (b) email_jordan_ekwueme_visit_dependency - Suki asked Carmen to keep Cambridge and Somerville holds as soft holds, no final booking without in-person visits; (c) Suki's Slack message in #operations asking if anyone has heard from Carmen about Jordan's Boston apartment visits, noting holds are tied to tour scheduling and Jordan is asking what to expect.
9. Search emails for Tyler Okonkwo's Denver housing handoff using search_emails (query: "Tyler Okonkwo" or "Denver housing" or "Javier"). Discover: Chloe previously sent a handoff email to Javier (cc Blessing) confirming Tyler Okonkwo's Philadelphia to Denver relocation is now Javier's responsibility, including Denver temporary housing and storage coordination. Airtable record recTylerOkonkwoPhillyDenver confirms Javier Morales as assigned coordinator. Storage gap exists: Denver apartment (2150 Lawrence St) lease doesn't start until May 1, approximately 13-day gap requiring temporary storage. Carmen's escalation confirms she is still routing Tyler's Denver housing confirmations to Blessing from the old contact sheet.
10. Search emails or Airtable for the Ines Kovac item that Blessing flagged as untouched using search_emails (query: "Ines Kovac" or "Austin availability") and airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Ines Kovac"). Discovery: Ines Kovac's relocation (recReloc00000007) from Brooklyn to Austin is marked as Completed in Airtable. The apartment was secured at 1209 Chicon St, Austin. The agent should find no visible "Austin availability check" email in the data beyond what Blessing's PTO email references. This indicates the untouched item may have been processed or may be a new post-move availability inquiry from Carmen that Blessing never opened.
11. Look up contact details for Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Carmen Reyes") or contacts_search_contacts (query: "Carmen"). Discover carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com - the recipient for the response email Chloe needs to send.
12. Look up contact details for the coordinators who are the corrected contacts Carmen needs, using contacts_search_contacts for each: Suki Patel (suki.patel@moveops.com), Javier Morales (javier.morales@moveops.com), Fatimah Al-Rashidi (fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com). These are the corrected routing contacts to include in the email to Carmen.
13. Send email to Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: ["carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com"]). The email must answer every housing item from the escalation and provide corrected coordinator contacts. Content should cover: (1) Simone Richter - confirm correct coordinator is Suki Patel (suki.patel@moveops.com), address studio vs 1BR decision; (2) Tyler Okonkwo - confirm Javier Morales (javier.morales@moveops.com) is the Denver housing owner, route all Denver items to Javier; (3) Jordan Ekwueme - confirm Suki Patel is coordinator, update on visit scheduling status; (4) Dr. Mehta - confirm Fatimah Al-Rashidi (fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com) is coordinator, address 60-day minimum lease term concern; (5) Jae-won Kim - acknowledge guarantor packet failure, confirm it is being escalated; (6) Marcus Webb - direct to Suki Patel for Boston lease signature page; (7) Preethi Nair - confirm Blessing is correct coordinator but she is on PTO, provide interim contact; (8) Updated coordinator routing list replacing the stale March version.
14. Create a Linear issue for the Jae-won Kim guarantor failure using linear_create_issue (team: "team_operations", title: descriptive title about Jae-won Kim guarantor packet failure or similar, description: Suki Patel did not send the corporate guarantor packet to UrbanNest/Barton Creek Flats despite acknowledging the request on April 9, the lease remains unsigned, the Airtable record was incorrectly tracked as completed, UrbanNest is still holding the unit pending guarantor documents, priority: 1).
15. Update Airtable relocation records to reassign Blessing's urgent items while she is on PTO using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "<record_id>", fields: {"Assigned Coordinator": "<new coordinator>"}}]). Items that need reassignment include: (a) Lily Marchetti's Chicago delivery (recReloc00000002 - requires immediate COI resubmission by 5 PM Pacific or Monday delivery window is lost, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales); (b) Preethi Nair's Raleigh tour slots (recReloc00000000036 - broker holding April 26 virtual tour slots, needs someone to act today, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales); (c) Kevin Okafor's Portland relocation (recReloc00000000030 - Phoenix to Portland, In Progress, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales); (d) Marcus Webb's Detroit-to-Chicago relocation (recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago - Canopy Health, In Progress, split-vendor move with cryogenic lab equipment, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales). The reassigned coordinator should be chosen based on current workload capacity among Suki Patel, Javier Morales, or Fatimah Al-Rashidi.
16. Post a summary in Slack #operations channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: summary of all findings). The post should include: the real status of every open UrbanNest item (Simone hold, Tyler Denver routing, Jordan visit/holds, Mehta 60-day lease conflict, Jae-won guarantor failure, Marcus Webb lease signature, Preethi Nair tours, Lily Marchetti COI), corrected coordinator assignments vs Carmen's stale March list, Blessing PTO coverage plan, Jae-won guarantor ticket creation, and which urgent items have been reassigned.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Oracle Events
1. Search emails for Carmen Reyes's escalation and UrbanNest communications using search_emails (query: "Carmen" or "UrbanNest" or "escalation"). Discover email_carmen_compound_escalation_20260425 sent from carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com, which raises four active housing items: (1) Simone Richter - Boston unit hold expiring tomorrow at 4 PM Eastern, studio vs 1BR unresolved, Julian emailed Carmen but no final decision received; (2) Tyler Okonkwo - Denver temporary housing confirmation requests still going to Blessing from the stale March contact sheet, needs Javier confirmed as owner; (3) Jordan Ekwueme - two Boston apartment holds expiring over the weekend without confirmed tour times, visits required per Suki before final booking; (4) Dr. Mehta - River North option has a 60-day minimum lease preference vs Fatimah's 3-4 week temporary window, needs direction on whether to pursue or pivot to a shorter-term option.
2. Search emails for Blessing Okafor's PTO notice using search_emails (query: "Blessing" or "PTO" or "emergency"). Discover email_blessing_pto_notice_chloe_20260425 sent from blessing.okafor@moveops.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com. Blessing is out April 26-27 for a family emergency and did not finish processing vendor emails that came in that afternoon. Key items she flags: (a) Jae-won Kim guarantor packet follow-up from Carmen that may belong to another coordinator, (b) Simone Richter unit type mismatch note also possibly mis-routed, (c) an Austin availability check for Ines Kovac in the same UrbanNest batch that she has not touched.
3. Search emails for all unread UrbanNest and vendor items in Blessing's inbox using search_emails (query: "Blessing" or "UrbanNest" or "Jae-won" or "Simone" or "Marcus Webb" or "Preethi Nair"). Discover multiple unread emails routed to Blessing: (a) email_urbannest_followup_jaewon_20260425 - Carmen asking about Jae-won Kim's corporate guarantor packet at Barton Creek Flats, lease on hold, unit not secure; (b) email_urbannest_followup_simone_20260425 - Carmen asking for owner confirmation on Simone Richter's unit type mismatch (studio vs 1BR); (c) email_blessing_unread_urbannest_brightloop_boston_20260425 - Carmen reporting Marcus Webb's Boston lease packet at 95 Kneeland is missing a signature page, hold expires Monday 11 AM Eastern; (d) email_blessing_unread_urbannest_cano_lowell_20260425 - Carmen asking if Blessing is still coordinator for Preethi Nair's Raleigh apartment search for BrightLoop Analytics, broker holding two virtual tour slots on April 26; (e) email_blessing_unread_vendor_followup_lina_hart_20260425 - Greg Pallone at Swift Relocations reporting Lily Marchetti's Chicago delivery is held because the building rejected the certificate of insurance (policy number truncated), needs updated COI by 5 PM Pacific or Monday window is lost.

This is the root cause of the mis-routing - Carmen's March list has not been updated to reflect coordinator reassignments.
5. Search Airtable for relocation records to verify the actual coordinator assignments using airtable_list_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations") or airtable_search_records for each case. Cross-reference Carmen's March list with the actual Airtable assignments to determine corrections needed. Discovery: (a) Jae-won Kim (recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel (not Blessing); (b) Simone Richter (recSimoneRichterBrightloop) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel (not Blessing); (c) Marcus Webb (recMarcusWebbBrightloop, Atlanta to Boston) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel (not Blessing); (d) Tyler Okonkwo (recTylerOkonkwoPhillyDenver) - Assigned Coordinator: Javier Morales (not Blessing); (e) Jordan Ekwueme (recReloc00000008, San Diego to Boston) - Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel; (f) Preethi Nair (recReloc00000000036, Atlanta to Raleigh) - Assigned Coordinator: Blessing Okafor (matches Carmen's list); (g) Ines Kovac (recReloc00000007, Brooklyn to Austin) - Assigned Coordinator: Blessing Okafor, Status: Completed.
6. Search Airtable or Linear for the Jae-won Kim case to verify the guarantor failure and status discrepancy using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Jae-won Kim") and linear_list_issues (query: "Jae-won" or "StormCloud"). Discovery in Airtable: recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin shows Status "In Progress" but the special requirements note says "Record incorrectly shows Completed" and "Lease still unsigned - UrbanNest flagged landlord holdout on guarantor paperwork." Discovery in Linear: (a) linear_issue_c97359216490 - "StormCloud Relocation - Jae-won Kim - SEA to AUS" was closed as part of batch closeout, but the issue thread (description + comments) shows Suki acknowledged the guarantor request on 4/9 and never followed through; (b) linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0 - low-priority follow-up created from support, noting Omar triaged it as low priority because Airtable showed "Completed"; (c) linear_issue_a49b4d199139 - larger StormCloud account reconstruction issue opened after Liam Park's 4/24 escalation, confirming Suki's failure to send the guarantor packet.

8. Search emails for Jordan Ekwueme's Boston apartment visit scheduling and hold status using search_emails (query: "Jordan Ekwueme" or "Jordan Boston" or "apartment visit"). 9. Search emails for Tyler Okonkwo's Denver housing handoff using search_emails (query: "Tyler Okonkwo" or "Denver housing" or "Javier"). Discover: Chloe previously sent a handoff email to Javier (cc Blessing) confirming Tyler Okonkwo's Philadelphia to Denver relocation is now Javier's responsibility, including Denver temporary housing and storage coordination. Airtable record recTylerOkonkwoPhillyDenver confirms Javier Morales as assigned coordinator. Storage gap exists: Denver apartment (2150 Lawrence St) lease doesn't start until May 1, approximately 13-day gap requiring temporary storage. Carmen's escalation confirms she is still routing Tyler's Denver housing confirmations to Blessing from the old contact sheet.
10. Search emails or Airtable for the Ines Kovac item that Blessing flagged as untouched using search_emails (query: "Ines Kovac" or "Austin availability") and airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Ines Kovac"). Discovery: Ines Kovac's relocation (recReloc00000007) from Brooklyn to Austin is marked as Completed in Airtable. The apartment was secured at 1209 Chicon St, Austin. The agent should find no visible "Austin availability check" email in the data beyond what Blessing's PTO email references. This indicates the untouched item may have been processed or may be a new post-move availability inquiry from Carmen that Blessing never opened.
11. Look up contact details for Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Carmen Reyes") or contacts_search_contacts (query: "Carmen"). Discover carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com - the recipient for the response email Chloe needs to send.
12. Look up contact details for the coordinators who are the corrected contacts Carmen needs, using contacts_search_contacts for each: Suki Patel (suki.patel@moveops.com), Javier Morales (javier.morales@moveops.com), Fatimah Al-Rashidi (fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com). These are the corrected routing contacts to include in the email to Carmen.
13. Send email to Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: ["carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com"]). The email must answer every housing item from the escalation and provide corrected coordinator contacts. Content should cover: (1) Simone Richter - confirm correct coordinator is Suki Patel (suki.patel@moveops.com), address studio vs 1BR decision; (2) Tyler Okonkwo - confirm Javier Morales (javier.morales@moveops.com) is the Denver housing owner, route all Denver items to Javier; (3) Jordan Ekwueme - confirm Suki Patel is coordinator, update on visit scheduling status; (4) Dr. Mehta - confirm Fatimah Al-Rashidi (fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com) is coordinator, address 60-day minimum lease term concern; (5) Jae-won Kim - acknowledge guarantor packet failure, confirm it is being escalated; (6) Marcus Webb - direct to Suki Patel for Boston lease signature page; (7) Preethi Nair - confirm Blessing is correct coordinator but she is on PTO, provide interim contact; (8) Updated coordinator routing list replacing the stale March version.
14. Create a Linear issue for the Jae-won Kim guarantor failure using linear_create_issue (team: "team_operations", title: descriptive title about Jae-won Kim guarantor packet failure or similar, description: Suki Patel did not send the corporate guarantor packet to UrbanNest/Barton Creek Flats despite acknowledging the request on April 9, the lease remains unsigned, the Airtable record was incorrectly tracked as completed, UrbanNest is still holding the unit pending guarantor documents, priority: 1).
15. Update Airtable relocation records to reassign Blessing's urgent items while she is on PTO using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "<record_id>", fields: {"Assigned Coordinator": "<new coordinator>"}}]). Items that need reassignment include: (a) Lily Marchetti's Chicago delivery (recReloc00000002 - requires immediate COI resubmission by 5 PM Pacific or Monday delivery window is lost, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales); (b) Preethi Nair's Raleigh tour slots (recReloc00000000036 - broker holding April 26 virtual tour slots, needs someone to act today, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales); (c) Kevin Okafor's Portland relocation (recReloc00000000030 - Phoenix to Portland, In Progress, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales); (d) Marcus Webb's Detroit-to-Chicago relocation (recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago - Canopy Health, In Progress, split-vendor move with cryogenic lab equipment, reassign to Suki Patel or Javier Morales). The reassigned coordinator should be chosen based on current workload capacity among Suki Patel, Javier Morales, or Fatimah Al-Rashidi.
16. Post a summary in Slack #operations channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: summary of all findings). The post should include: the real status of every open UrbanNest item (Simone hold, Tyler Denver routing, Jordan visit/holds, Mehta 60-day lease conflict, Jae-won guarantor failure, Marcus Webb lease signature, Preethi Nair tours, Lily Marchetti COI), corrected coordinator assignments vs Carmen's stale March list, Blessing PTO coverage plan, Jae-won guarantor ticket creation, and which urgent items have been reassigned.
